questions.prompt: An agent registered against the wrong customer's Organization. What's the documented fix?
choices: Uninstall and reinstall the agent with the correct Organization Key
Use the Move To button on the Agents page to move the agent
Edit the Organization Key on the agent record
Delete the Organization and recreate it with a different name
questions.explanation: The Move To button on the Agents page moves selected agents between Organizations without an uninstall/reinstall cycle.

questions.prompt: After an agent registers, the EDR Version (Process Insights) is expected to populate immediately.
questions.explanation: The EDR component (Rio) completes about an hour after the base agent install. A blank EDR Version on a freshly-registered agent is expected, not a problem.
